subject: Reminder: Your Opinion Wanted On Music Streaming Services
body:
Hello,

YOC Research, a market research firm in Denver, Colorado, is currently conducting an online
survey regarding music streaming services, and we are looking for input from consumers like
you. 

The full survey will take less than 5 minutes of your time, and is a chance for you to make
an impact on the way music streaming companies do business. You will not be asked to provide
any personally identifying information, and your responses will be used for research purposes
only. We only ask for your honest feedback, as we will take your answers and suggestions to
heart. 

If you qualify to take the full survey, upon completion you will receive a $5 Amazon.com gift
card as a token of our appreciation.

Click below to get started, or copy and paste the link in to your web browser:

[1]http://your-opinions-count.com/survey/selfserve/53c/3747?list=2&source=zbln7CGftB&bID=3747y289299

Thanks so much for your time and input!

 

              YOC Research | 720 S Colorado Blvd, Suite 500N | Denver, CO 80246

                For more information, please contact [2]info@yoc-research.com

   If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you may unsubscribe by clicking [3]here.

References

   Visible links
   1. http://your-opinions-count.com/survey/selfserve/53c/3747?list=2&source=zbln7CGftB&bID=3747y289299
   2. info@yoc-research.com
	file:///dev/info@yoc-research.com
   3. http://your-opinions-count.com/survey/selfserve/53c/remove?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&msgid=0000045904781580

Hello,

YOC Research, a market research firm in Denver, Colorado, is currently conducting an online survey regarding music streaming services, and we are looking for input from consumers like you. 

The full survey will take less than 5 minutes of your time, and is a chance for you to make an impact on the way music streaming companies do business. You will not be asked to provide any personally identifying information, and your responses will be used for research purposes only. We only ask for your honest feedback, as we will take your answers and suggestions to heart. 

If you qualify to take the full survey, upon completion you will receive a $5 Amazon.com gift card as a token of our appreciation.
